notes:
DCA Admissions Suite v2.7.8 Release Notes

New Features
- Added Acceptance Fee payment tracking fields.
- Added Paid workflow status and Acceptance Fee Paid dashboard count.
- Blocked Admission Letter sending until Acceptance Fee is marked paid.
- Added batch Admission Letter eligibility check for unpaid applicants.
- Added guarded Student Enrollment from individual application records.
- Added batch Enroll Students action for eligible applicants.
- Added Apps Script Students sheet support with duplicate enrollment protection.
- Added expanded online application form fields from the legacy form.
- Added Religion, NIN, Class Completed, Transfer Certificate/Testimonial, parent office addresses, Living With, school-background questions, and expanded declaration text.
- Added required-field indicators and Pre Nursery to the class lists.

Backend Update Required
Deploy DCA_Admission_Backend_v2_7_8_Unified.gs to Google Apps Script and publish a new web app version.
